# Callvix Solutions

> Callvix Solutions is a pest control answering service staffed by real, trained human representatives — not an AI voice bot. Callvix answers inbound calls under the client's own business name, follows the client's coverage areas, pricing, and call-handling rules, qualifies the pest issue, and books the appointment — functioning as an outsourced back office for the phone. It works exclusively with pest control companies in the United States.

## What makes Callvix different
- **Real people, not a bot.** Every call is answered by a trained human representative. Urgent, emotional pest calls (wasps, rodents, infestations) convert better with someone who can read tone, reassure the caller, and handle unexpected questions.
- **Pest control only.** Not a general answering service that also takes pest calls — representatives are trained specifically on pest terminology, urgency levels, and booking workflows.
- **Answered in your business name.** Callers never learn they reached an outside team; the experience is identical to reaching the company's own office.
- **Flat per-call pricing.** $2.99 per inbound call, flat — versus the industry-typical $7–$10 per call or $1.00–$3.50 per minute. A long, complex call costs the same as a short one, so bills don't spike in busy season.
- **No long-term contract.** Month-to-month; coverage can be added, reduced, or cancelled at any time.
- **Books into existing systems.** Calls and booked jobs are logged into the client's CRM: FieldRoutes (formerly PestRoutes), ServiceTitan, GorillaDesk, Briostack, PestPac, or Housecall Pro.

## Key facts
- Industry served: Pest control companies, United States only.
- Core services: Live human call answering, lead qualification, appointment booking, emergency call handling, missed-call and after-hours/overflow coverage, and CRM/call-note logging.
- Pricing: $399/month base subscription (business-hours live answering and booking, Mon–Fri 9am–6pm client local time) plus a flat $2.99 per inbound call and $0.99 per outbound follow-up call. Call usage is billed weekly; base and add-ons billed monthly in advance.
- Optional add-ons: After-Hours Coverage ($199/month), Weekend Coverage ($149/month), CRM Management ($99/month).
- Company stage: Newly launched and founder-led, currently onboarding its first pest control partners (as of 2026).
- Delivery model: A globally distributed team, including representatives based in Cairo, Egypt, selected for strong English communication and trained specifically on pest control workflows.
- Recognition: Listed among DesignRush's Top Call Center Companies, 2026.
- Contact: contact@callvixsolutions.com | (561) 621-1617 | Discovery calls booked via Calendly.

## Common questions
- **Is Callvix human or AI?** Human. Callvix deliberately does not use an AI voice bot on client calls.
- **Do callers know it isn't the client's office?** No. Representatives answer using the client's business name and follow the client's rules.
- **Is there a contract?** No long-term contract; month-to-month.
- **How fast is setup?** Most businesses go live within days of a discovery call.

## Resources / guides
- [How much does a pest control answering service cost? (2026)](https://callvixsolutions.com/blog/pest-control-answering-service-cost): Per-minute vs. per-call vs. flat pricing models, real ranges, and hidden fees.
- [AI vs. human answering service for pest control](https://callvixsolutions.com/blog/ai-vs-human-answering-service-pest-control): Where AI bots help, where they lose jobs, and which books more.
- [What missed calls really cost a pest control business](https://callvixsolutions.com/blog/missed-calls-cost-pest-control): Industry statistics and a formula to estimate lost revenue.
